description_long: This is a two-story house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front porch supported by multiple columns and a balcony above. The facade is symmetrical, with evenly spaced windows on both levels and a central entryway. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a modern, streamlined appearance. The property includes a paved driveway, a car parked to the side, and landscaped elements such as palm trees and other greenery. The exterior appears to be finished in a combination of light and dark tones, with the porch and balcony railings adding architectural detail. The house is set within a modest yard, bordered by additional trees and a patio area.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a columned front porch, and landscaped yard with palm trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, columned porch, balcony, driveway, car, and two palm trees in the yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, symmetrical window arrangement, and additional trees in the background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more trees, and the driveway with a car parked to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio area, rear landscaping, and the house's flat roof and balcony details.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with steps, covered porch supported by columns, and a balcony above
